zh.Garthorpe, Melton Mowbray, Leicestershir: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾加索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Robert de la Hyde於大約1193年出生在英國爾諾波利時，他的父親Mathew de la Hyde28歲，母親Maud de Norbury24歲。他於1219年與Lady Agnes de Herdislee在英國爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1236年在英國爾海德享年45歲。

zh-hans.Garthorpe, Melton Mowbray, Leicestershir: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾加索普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Robert de la Hyde于大约1193年出生在英国爾諾波利时，他的父亲Mathew de la Hyde28岁，母亲Maud de Norbury24岁。他于1219年与Lady Agnes de Herdislee在英国爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1236年在英国爾海德享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Robert de la Hyde was born about 1193, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Mathew de la Hyde, was 28 and his mother, Maud de Norbury, was 24. He married Lady Agnes de Herdislee in 1219, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1236, in Hyde, Cheshire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Robert de la Hyde est né environ 1193, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Mathew de la Hyde, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maud de Norbury, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes de Herdislee en 1219, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1236, à Hyde, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Robert de la Hyde um 1193 in Norbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mathew de la Hyde 28 und seine Mutter Maud de Norbury 24. Er hat 1219 in Cheshire, England Lady Agnes de Herdislee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1236 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Hyde, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert de la Hyde è nato il circa 1193 nel Norbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Mathew de la Hyde, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Norbury, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes de Herdislee nel 1219, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1236, nel Hyde, Cheshire, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Robert de la Hydeが約1193年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Mathew de la Hydeは28歳，母Maud de Norburyは24歳であった。1219年にイギリスチェシュアイアでLady Agnes de Herdisleeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1236年にイギリスチェシュアイアハイドで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Robert de la Hyde(이)가 대략 1193년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathew de la Hyde(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Norbury(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1219년 영국 체실르에서 Lady Agnes de Herdislee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1236년 영국 체실르 히드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert de la Hyde nasceu aproximadamente 1193, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Mathew de la Hyde, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Norbury, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes de Herdislee em 1219, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1236, em Hyde, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Robert de la Hyde родился около 1193 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Mathew de la Hyde было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Norbury, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes de Herdislee в 1219 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1236 г. в местности хид, чешир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

Se casó con Lady Agnes de Herdislee en 1219, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1236, en Hyde, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
